assertions.reason: Approval prompts include action details and y/n instructions; `y` sends approval-granted, `n` sends approval-denied, non-y/n replies re-prompt, and a cancelled request clears pending state so the next prompt is forwarded.

Session-not-found errors surface as `Session not found` and malformed forwarding payloads are logged without crashing the bot, but a relay-unreachable `/list` surfaces the raw message `fetch failed` instead of a clearer relay-down error.

Menu `stop`, `detach`, and `list` route through the same bot handlers and replies as text commands, unknown keys respond with `Unknown menu action "mystery".`, and menu events resolve user context from `open_id`.

`/stop` while detached replies `Attach to a session first with /attach <session>.`; `/stop` on an attached idle session replies `Session [workspace-stop] is already idle; nothing to stop.` and does not send an interrupt.

commands.observation: 17 tests passed, including approval handling, /stop edge cases, menu routing, relay error replies, and forwarding poll recovery.
6 tests passed, including 404 relay error surfacing and malformed API response rejection.
2 tests passed, covering menu event dispatch and malformed/non-text Feishu event rejection.
Captured exact bot messages/calls for approval, /stop, menu, relay-unreachable, 404, and malformed-forwarding scenarios.

summary: Tested 4 assertions for bot-service: 3 passed (VAL-BOT-005, VAL-BOT-011, VAL-CROSS-009) and 1 failed (VAL-BOT-010 because relay-unreachable user messaging is the raw `fetch failed`).
